---
title: "Open Data Regensburg"
description: "Mapping public infrastructure in the city of Regensburg: drinking fountains, decorative fountains, and glass recycling containers."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [R, Open Data, Geospatial]
---

## About

A spatial analysis of the City of Regensburg's open municipal data. Maps where the city's drinking fountains, ornamental fountains, and glass recycling containers are located — combining the official open-government datasets with interactive maps to make urban infrastructure easier to find and to support city planning and public accessibility.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [Open Data]{.badge-skill} [Geospatial]{.badge-skill}
